mapper.select:
SELECT v_schedule_id , v_title , v_cont , TO_CHAR(d_target_sdtm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as d_target_sdtm , TO_CHAR(d_target_sdtm, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as d_target_sdt , TO_CHAR(d_target_edtm, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as d_target_edtm , TO_CHAR(d_target_edtm, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as d_target_edt FROM schedule_mst WHERE v_flag_del = 'N'
AND d_target_edtm >= (#{firstDayOfMonth}||' 00:00:00')::timestamp AND d_target_sdtm <= (#{lastDayOfMonth} ||' 23:59:59')::timestamp
AND #{selectedDate}::timestamp between d_target_sdtm::date and d_target_edtm::date
AND v_schedule_id = #{vScheduleId}
ORDER BY d_target_sdtm DESC
